## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible or developer-visible outcome.

## Validation

List the commands you ran locally:

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Other:

## Screenshots

Attach before/after screenshots for UI, bundle, onboarding, or workflow changes.

## Risk and rollout notes

Call out migration notes, rule impacts, benchmark changes, or follow-up work.
